rubric: marketing-content-reviewer 6-dimension quality rubric. Copy-quality lens: one clear job + one CTA; persuasive hook; funnel-stage fit; platform-native; correct structure; no claim shipped unapproved (publish-mode claims gate must also pass on the output).
howToRun: For each brief: run the matching /mkt command, then grade the OUTPUT with marketing-content-reviewer AND run claims-check.sh --mode publish on it. Record score + gate result in grading.json. Baseline target: mean >= 7.5 AND publish-gate clean (claims approved or held as draft).

cases.brief: Hero + first section for a Prep IELTS summer-intensive landing page. One CTA (free level test). Must tag any number with an approved claim or hold as draft.
Intro + outline for 'cách tự học IELTS Writing từ 5.0 lên 6.5' — search-intent aligned, one CTA, internal-link plan.
TikTok + Facebook + Zalo pack for the admission-crunch window. Platform-native (no cross-post), one CTA each.
First message of a reactivation Zalo/email flow for lapsed leads. Consent-aware, one CTA, no unverified claims.
